reasoning: The HIPAA control 164.312(a)(2)(iv) focuses on encryption and decryption, which directly maps to Kubernetes security practices involving encryption of secrets and etcd data. Kubernetes provides mechanisms to encrypt secrets at rest using encryption providers configured in the API server. Additionally, etcd data can be encrypted to protect sensitive information stored in the cluster. These configurations align with the requirement to ensure data is encrypted both at rest and during transmission.
title: 164_312_a_2_iv: 164.312(a)(2)(iv) Encryption and decryption
